en: I'll tell you a little bit about the irrational behavior not yours of course other people's
ko: 우주에 대해 알려줄 수 있는 가장 놀라운 사실이 뭔가요

en: So after being at MIT for a few years I realized that writing academic papers
ko: 가장 놀라운 사실은 지구의 생명을 구성하는 원자들이

en: is not that exciting You know I don't know how many of those you read but it's not fun to read and often not fun to write even
ko: 인체를 이루는 원자들이 추적 가능하다는 거예요

en: worse to write So I decided to try and write something more fun
ko: 극한의 온도와 압력 속에서 가벼운 원소를 무거운 원소로 만든 도가니까지요

en: And I came up with an idea that I will write a cookbook
ko: 이 별들 중 질량이 큰 것들은 후기에 불안정해져서 붕괴한 뒤 폭발했어요

en: And the title for my cookbook was going to be Dining Without Crumbs The Art of Eating Over the Sink
ko: 풍요로운 내장을 은하에 뿌렸죠 탄소 질소

en: And it was going to be a look at life through the kitchen and I was quite excited about this I was going to talk a little bit about research a
little bit about the kitchen You know we do so much in the kitchen I thought
ko: 이 재료들은 가스 구름이 되어 응축하고 붕괴하여 다음
